benchmark_report.testing_methodology: Scientific complexity analysis based on CLAUDE.md standards

commands_analyzed.name: ultrathink-hybrid-mcp.md
commands_analyzed.savage_verdict: Token-guzzling monster with 124% complexity violation. This is computational obesity masquerading as intelligence.

evidence.failure_surface: 16 MCP dependency points + 17 thinking failure modes = 33 potential failure scenarios
evidence.maintenance_horror: 535 lines to debug when it inevitably breaks

commands_analyzed.name: senior-developer-analysis.md
commands_analyzed.savage_verdict: Only functioning adult in the room. Shocking display of following actual rules.

evidence.success_indicators: Follows CLAUDE.md complexity rules, reasonable token density

commands_analyzed.name: adaptive-complexity-router.md
commands_analyzed.savage_verdict: Traffic controller that causes traffic jams. Has more decision points than a government bureaucracy.

complexity_breakdown.irony_factor: Router for complexity that IS complexity

evidence.decision_paralysis: 41 control flow constructs = 41 ways to make wrong decisions
evidence.meta_failure: Command designed to reduce complexity scores 6.8/5 itself

savage_commentary.overall_assessment: 🔥 SCIENTIFIC CONCLUSION: 67% of commands are architected like they were designed by committee during a sugar rush. Only 1/3 follow the basic complexity rules you yourself wrote down.
statistical_burns: Mean complexity of 7.0 when limit is 5.0 = 40% systematic rule violation
Standard deviation of 4.1 indicates you can't even fail consistently
16 MCP calls in one command = more dependencies than a divorced parent
41 control flow constructs = more branches than the Amazon rainforest

evidence_based_roasting.ultrathink_hybrid_mcp: 535 lines of 'thinking' that produce more overhead than output. This isn't intelligence, it's digital hoarding.
evidence_based_roasting.adaptive_complexity_router: Irony level: MAXIMUM. A complexity router that violates complexity rules is like a diet book written by someone who's never seen a vegetable.
evidence_based_roasting.senior_developer_analysis: Lone survivor in complexity compliance. Apparently someone actually READ the CLAUDE.md file.

immediate_actions: Delete 2/3 of ultrathink-hybrid-mcp thinking blocks (keep 5-6 essential ones)
Simplify adaptive-complexity-router to single decision tree (not 41-branch forest)
Use senior-developer-analysis as template for complexity compliance
architectural_fixes: Implement complexity budget enforcement in command creation
Add complexity CI checks to prevent future violations
Create simple command variants for common use cases
statistical_targets: Reduce mean complexity from 7.0 to 4.5 (10% safety margin below 5.0 limit)

confidence_metrics.data_quality: HIGH - Direct file analysis with multiple measurement vectors
confidence_metrics.sample_representativeness: GOOD - Random selection from full command set
confidence_metrics.statistical_significance: MEDIUM - Small sample (n=3) but clear patterns
